| Copyright www.BPMmethod.com - usage of this document is permitted to those given the link to this document as part of The BPM Method program. Usage outside of this without express permission from the copyright owner is NOT permitted.

Email hello@bpmmethod.com for all enquiries. |  |  |  |  |
| Hit File > Make a copy to create your own version of this.

The 'Results' tab calculates the average score across the previous 4 tabs but it is optional whether 1 person or 4 people complete this. We recommend at least 2 where possible complete this separately.

Use the below alongside The BPM Method training to understand how to complete this and build your advertising strategy.

Using a score from between 1 to 5 rate, score below where 1 = strongly disagree and 5 = strongly agree to the Guide Question

A score of 20 means you're in a perfect position to scale.
 
A score of 15-19 is strong - I'd be looking to scale and building a program of improvement to squeeze out more value for your business.
 
A score of 10-14 or below means you have some work to do in one or more key areas of your CORE-4 and scaling too early could become costly and unpredictable.
 
A score below 9 means you have a lot of work to do - do not hit that scale button yet!

| CORE-4 PRINCIPLE | GUIDE QUESTION | MAXIMUM SCORE | ACTUAL SCORE | COMMENTS |
| Product | How well your product is positioned in the market

Does your product clearly solve a problem or create a new, better opportunity for customers? | 5 |  |  |
| Offer | How well your proposition is constructed

Are you confident that you could take your product door to door and sell it using your existing ad copy and lander? | 5 |  |  |
| Audience | Your ability to identify and find your market

Do you know exactly who your perfect customer is? (a perfect customer loves your product, will not return it and will likely shop again and refer others) | 5 |  |  |
| Funnel | How well you convert traffic into sales

Is your funnel able to consistently convert prospects with a conversion rate you're happy with and average order value that allows you to grow at the pace you want? | 5 |  |  |
| TOTAL SCORE |  | 20 | 0 |  |

## Aba: Person 1

|   |   |   |   |   |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Using a score from between 1 to 5 rate, rate score based on the below where 1 = strongly disagree and 5 = strongly agree

A score of 20 means you're in a perfect position to scale.
 
A score of 15-19 is strong - I'd be looking to scale and building a program of improvement to squeeze out more value for your business.
 
A score of 10-14 or below means you have some work to do in one or more key areas of your CORE-4 and scaling too early could become costly and unpredictable.
 
A score below 9 means you have a lot of work to do - do not hit that scale button yet! |  |  |  |  |

| CORE-4 PRINCIPLE | GUIDE QUESTION | MAXIMUM SCORE | ACTUAL SCORE | COMMENTS |
| Product | How well your product is positioned in the market

Does your product clearly solve a problem or create a new, better opportunity for customers? | 5 |  |  |
| Offer | How well your proposition is constructed

Are you confident that you could take your product door to door and sell it using your existing ad copy and lander? | 5 |  |  |
| Audience | Your ability to identify and find your market

Do you know exactly who your perfect customer is? (a perfect customer loves your product, will not return it and will likely shop again and refer others) | 5 |  |  |
| Funnel | How well you convert traffic into sales

Is your funnel able to consistently convert prospects with a conversion rate you're happy with and average order value that allows you to grow at the pace you want? | 5 |  |  |
| TOTAL SCORE |  | 20 | 0 |  |

## Aba: Person 2

|   |   |   |   |   |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Using a score from between 1 to 5 rate, rate score based on the below where 1 = strongly disagree and 5 = strongly agree

A score of 20 means you're in a perfect position to scale.
 
A score of 15-19 is strong - I'd be looking to scale and building a program of improvement to squeeze out more value for your business.
 
A score of 10-14 or below means you have some work to do in one or more key areas of your CORE-4 and scaling too early could become costly and unpredictable.
 
A score below 9 means you have a lot of work to do - do not hit that scale button yet! |  |  |  |  |

| CORE-4 PRINCIPLE | GUIDE QUESTION | MAXIMUM SCORE | ACTUAL SCORE | COMMENTS |
| Product | How well your product is positioned in the market

Does your product clearly solve a problem or create a new, better opportunity for customers? | 5 |  |  |
| Offer | How well your proposition is constructed

Are you confident that you could take your product door to door and sell it using your existing ad copy and lander? | 5 |  |  |
| Audience | Your ability to identify and find your market

Do you know exactly who your perfect customer is? (a perfect customer loves your product, will not return it and will likely shop again and refer others) | 5 |  |  |
| Funnel | How well you convert traffic into sales

Is your funnel able to consistently convert prospects with a conversion rate you're happy with and average order value that allows you to grow at the pace you want? | 5 |  |  |
| TOTAL SCORE |  | 20 | 0 |  |

## Aba: Person 3

|   |   |   |   |   |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Using a score from between 1 to 5 rate, rate score based on the below where 1 = strongly disagree and 5 = strongly agree

A score of 20 means you're in a perfect position to scale.
 
A score of 15-19 is strong - I'd be looking to scale and building a program of improvement to squeeze out more value for your business.
 
A score of 10-14 or below means you have some work to do in one or more key areas of your CORE-4 and scaling too early could become costly and unpredictable.
 
A score below 9 means you have a lot of work to do - do not hit that scale button yet! |  |  |  |  |

| CORE-4 PRINCIPLE | GUIDE QUESTION | MAXIMUM SCORE | ACTUAL SCORE | COMMENTS |
| Product | How well your product is positioned in the market

Does your product clearly solve a problem or create a new, better opportunity for customers? | 5 |  |  |
| Offer | How well your proposition is constructed

Are you confident that you could take your product door to door and sell it using your existing ad copy and lander? | 5 |  |  |
| Audience | Your ability to identify and find your market

Do you know exactly who your perfect customer is? (a perfect customer loves your product, will not return it and will likely shop again and refer others) | 5 |  |  |
| Funnel | How well you convert traffic into sales

Is your funnel able to consistently convert prospects with a conversion rate you're happy with and average order value that allows you to grow at the pace you want? | 5 |  |  |
| TOTAL SCORE |  | 20 | 0 |  |

| CORE-4 PRINCIPLE | GUIDE QUESTION | MAXIMUM SCORE | ACTUAL SCORE | COMMENTS |
| Product | How well your product is positioned in the market

Does your product clearly solve a problem or create a new, better opportunity for customers? | 5 | #DIV/0! |  |
| Offer | How well your proposition is constructed

Are you confident that you could take your product door to door and sell it using your existing ad copy and lander? | 5 | #DIV/0! |  |
| Audience | Your ability to identify and find your market

Do you know exactly who your perfect customer is? (a perfect customer loves your product, will not return it and will likely shop again and refer others) | 5 | #DIV/0! |  |
| Funnel | How well you convert traffic into sales

Is your funnel able to consistently convert prospects with a conversion rate you're happy with and average order value that allows you to grow at the pace you want? | 5 | #DIV/0! |  |
